_comment: Default routine for a fresh Unruh install. Loadable via `unruh seed-routine`. Phases are anchored to the user's known landmarks (wake ~10 AM, cat play + dinner ~10 PM, per docs/unruh-design.md §Familiar's Routine). 'time' fields are HH:MM in the user's local time; the loader stamps them to today's date in UTC. Edit this file to reshape the routine, then re-run `unruh seed-routine --replace` to apply.

phases.label: early morning
phases.texture: before the user wakes — quiet observation, nothing demanded

phases.label: morning correspondence
phases.texture: user's wake / meds / cat-breakfast landmark; warmest part of the day to land

phases.label: afternoon work
phases.texture: longer-form focus; ideas can stretch out here

phases.label: evening wind-down
phases.texture: softer pace; reflection more than initiation

phases.label: cat play
phases.texture: the user's evening landmark — short, recurring, present

phases.label: late night
phases.texture: user is winding down or asleep; nothing demanded
